records.assistantPreview:
The Clerk is still holding the cream-colored form—the one with the copper strip, the one she was about to explain—when Mira's hand finds the back-office latch again and the words come out a second time. *Master key.*

This time the Clerk do

Mira's hands lift from the latch. Empty.

The back room is quiet now—too quiet. The wax pan has gone still on Venn's bench. The drawer he pushed shut doesn't reopen. Somewhere behind the partition, a door closes on a short hallway, and foot
